description: Exceptions for npm audit advisories that have been reviewed and accepted.

advisories.title: Post-Install Script Execution Risk in transformers.js
advisories.reason: @xenova/transformers is a deprecated package used for local embeddings. It runs postinstall scripts. Migration to @huggingface/transformers is planned (M0.82). The package is isolated and does not handle user input at runtime.

advisories.title: Prototype Pollution in Protobufjs (transitive via onnx-proto)
advisories.reason: Transitive dependency of @xenova/transformers. Not directly used by ALiX. Prototype pollution risk is limited to internal ONNX model parsing — no user-controlled input reaches the vulnerable path.

advisories.title: Vulnerable ONNX Runtime Web Version
advisories.reason: Transitive dependency of @xenova/transformers. Used only for ML model inference, not accessible via network. Migration to @huggingface/transformers will eliminate this dependency.

advisories.title: Prototype Pollution in protobufjs (< 7.6.2)
advisories.reason: Transitive dependency via @xenova/transformers. ALiX does not parse untrusted protobuf input. The library is used internally for ONNX model format only. Migration to updated transformers will resolve this.

advisories.title: Dev-only: Vite Server File Access Vulnerability
advisories.reason: Dev dependency only — vitest uses vite. Development-only exposure; not shipped in production tarball. Vite dev server is only run locally during test execution.
